hindi: जय राम रूपी अरूप अज, सच्चिदानंद राम। मनुज देह धारण किए, लीला करत ललाम॥
english: Victory to Ram who is both form and formless, eternal; consciousness-bliss, Ram assumed human form to perform divine deeds
roman: Jai Ram Roobi Aroop Aj, Sachchidanand Ram, Manuj Deh Dharan Kiye, Leela Karat Lalama

hindi: जय श्री राम जय जय रघुराई। जय दशरथ नंदन जग की सहाई॥
english: Victory to Shri Ram, victory to Raghuraj; son of Dasharatha, helper of the world
roman: Jai Shri Ram Jai Jai Raghuray, Jai Dashrath Nandan Jag Ki Sahay

hindi: अयोध्यापति जग के स्वामी। रघुवर रामचंद्र अंतर्यामी॥
english: Lord of Ayodhya, master of the world; Raghuvar Ramachandra, knower of all hearts
roman: Ayodhyapati Jag Ke Swami, Raghuvar Ramchandra Antaryami

hindi: जानकीनाथ कृपा करो। भक्तन के संकट हरो॥
english: O Lord of Janaki, show grace; remove the troubles of devotees
roman: Janakinath Kripa Karo, Bhaktan Ke Sankat Haro

hindi: सुंदरकांड में वर्णित गाथा। हनुमत के स्वामी जगत के नाथ॥
english: The tale narrated in Sundarakanda; lord of Hanuman and master of the world
roman: Sundarkand Mein Varnit Gatha, Hanumat Ke Swami Jagat Ke Nath

hindi: राम चालीसा जो नर गावे। राम कृपा मोक्ष फल पावे॥
english: Whoever sings the Ram Chalisa; attains the fruit of liberation by Ram's grace
roman: Ram Chalisa Jo Nar Gaave, Ram Kripa Moksha Phal Paave

hindi: जय जय जय रघुनंदन राई। हृदय बसो मम राम सहाई॥
english: Victory to Raghunandana, the king; dwell in my heart Ram, my helper
roman: Jai Jai Jai Raghunandan Rai, Hriday Baso Mam Ram Sahai
